findings.summary: pedagogical-cadence 4-gram repeated 3+ times: 1 distinct repeating cadences
integration starvation — 3+ consecutive named insights with no dwell beat between them (criterion #13 broken band; §7.3 dwell contract)

run_excerpt: The loop does not account for the cost of starting every day already behind.
This is not fiction from this book's cast — it is a cited story from elsewhere.
